creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
This behavior still occurs; not sure if it's correct though...

$ cat pr13042.mk 
foo: sub*/lib*.a
        touch $@
$ make -f pr13042.mk                                                                                                                                              
touch foo
$ mkdir sub1 sub2
$ touch sub{1,2}/libx.a
$ make -f pr13042.mk 
`foo' is up to date.
$ make -VMAKE_VERSION
20151020
